sso.upgradeDescription: SSO with OIDC and SAML 2.0 is available on the Enterprise plan.
sso.upgradeCloudHint: Upgrade your plan to configure single sign-on for your organization.
sso.upgradeSelfHostedHint: Activate an Enterprise license to configure single sign-on for your organization.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.description: Help us improve the RabbitMQ Dashboard by sharing your thoughts, reporting bugs, or suggesting new features.
feedback.typeLabel: What type of feedback do you have? *
feedback.featureRequestDesc: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
feedback.improvementDesc: Suggest ways to improve existing features
feedback.descriptionPlaceholder: Provide detailed information about your feedback. For bugs, please include steps to reproduce.
feedback.emailHelp: We'll only use this to follow up on your feedback if needed
feedback.toastSubmittedDesc: Thank you for your feedback! We'll review it and get back to you if needed.
feedback.toastFailedDesc: Failed to submit feedback. Please try again.
